sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41128" key="e)pisunaloifh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισυν-ᾰλοιφή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n41128.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">elision at the close of a verse,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Heph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.226</biblScope> </bibl> C. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n41128.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">coalescence of two syllables</tr_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in one,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Isid.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Etym.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.35.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
